current_version_notes.민사집행법: Current MST 268837; future amendment MST 284419 effective 20280301 also exists.
current_version_notes.민사소송법: Current MST 252393; future amendment MST 284417 effective 20280301 also exists.
current_version_notes.신용정보법: Current MST 260423; future amendments MST 285955 effective 20260813 and MST 283841 effective 20260911 exist.
current_version_notes.회생파산법: Current MST 267359; future related amendment MST 91493 effective 20280101 exists.

sources.graph_use: Attachment route requires a court attachment order for execution against debtor claims toward third parties.
Collection order route must distinguish collection order from assignment order and finality requirements.
Attachment target checks must inspect wage, severance, deposit, insurance, livelihood account, and one-month living cost exemptions.
Property disclosure requires money-payment enforcement title and executable copy/documents.
Property inquiry route depends on prior property disclosure episode, statutory failure/insufficiency condition, institution scope, and prepaid costs.
Default registry route needs final/written title plus six-month nonpayment or property disclosure failure proof.
Payment order becomes title-equivalent only after no objection/withdrawal/dismissal finality.
Judgment-equivalent claim limitation clock is generally modeled as 10 years after finality, with maturity caveat.
Claims, attachment/provisional attachment/provisional disposition, and acknowledgment become limitation events in debtor timeline.
Fraudulent transfer route needs suspicious transfer, harm/knowledge facts, and one-year/five-year deadlines.

sources.rule_axis: 폭행 협박 반복 야간 연락 등 금지
sources.graph_use: Contact/action recommendation must block coercive, repeated, night, third-party exposure, and unlawful pressure patterns.
Agent must not imply nonexistent claim, state authority, false legal status, or untrue proceeding state.
Cease/review gates required for relationship contact, insolvency stay, discharge/rehabilitation, and exposed postcard-like communications.

sources.law_name: 신용정보의 이용 및 보호에 관한 법률
sources.graph_use: Debtor memory ingestion must track purpose, minimum-necessary scope, fair collection, consent/exception basis.

sources.law_name: 신용정보의 이용 및 보호에 관한 법률
sources.graph_use: External financial-credit data route requires consent/exception/proof-burden metadata before graph promotion.

sources.law_name: 채무자 회생 및 파산에 관한 법률
sources.graph_use: Insolvency signal can block execution, provisional attachment, auction, and repayment demands until review.

sources.law_name: 채무자 회생 및 파산에 관한 법률
sources.graph_use: Commencement order can stop/prohibit enforcement/repayment demand; limitation clock handling must record stopped period.

sources.law_name: 채무자 회생 및 파산에 관한 법률
sources.graph_use: Discharge detection should block ordinary collection unless claim falls in statutory exception category.

key_finding: Legal knowledge must be stored as curated versioned rule-source records, not as unversioned prompt memory.
